title: Building AINowGuide.com from Scratch
summary: Full build session for AINowGuide.com. PHP/JSON flat-file architecture, dark teal UI design system, channel and session data models, and GitHub Actions deployment.
description: This is the session that built AI Now Guide from the ground up. Starting from a blank repo, we built the complete PHP/JSON stack: config, router, schema, admin content system, all 8 channels, sample sessions, and the homepage. The design system uses a teal/aqua dark premium aesthetic based on krisada.com's directory architecture.
